description_long: This hardware store is a compact, rectangular building with a flat roof and a minimalist, modern facade. The exterior features a combination of smooth white surfaces and textured red panels, creating a visually striking contrast. Large, dark-framed windows dominate the front and rear, allowing natural light to enter and providing visibility into the store. The base of the building is finished with a gray material, likely concrete, adding to its sturdy appearance. There are no visible doors, signage, or decorative elements, emphasizing a clean and functional design. The overall structure suggests durability and practicality, suitable for an urban commercial environment.
description: A modern, rectangular hardware store with white and red exterior panels, large dark-framed windows, and a flat roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large window with a black frame and a red textured panel to the right.
description_view_1: Side view with plain white wall and narrow red textured panels at the edges, no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large window with a black frame and a red textured panel to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain white wall and narrow red textured panels at the edges, no windows or doors visible.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a large window and a red textured panel on the front facade, with no visible entrance or signage. The sides are plain with narrow red panels, and the rear mirrors the front with a large window and red panel.
